description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service. Add a global before_script that logs in to $CI_REGISTRY with $CI_REGISTRY_USER and $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD. Define a single stage called build and two jobs: a build job that runs on all branches except master, executing docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG" . and docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG"; and a build-master job that runs only on the master branch, executing docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE" . and docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE". Both jobs use the same stage and have no caches, artifacts, or deployment targets.
